name: Phoenix Biotech Acquisition Corp. Warrants
summary: Phoenix Biotech Acquisition Corp. Warrants represent the right to purchase shares of common stock in Phoenix Biotech Acquisition Corp., a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC). These warrants are issued as part of the units offered during the SPAC's initial public offering and become exercisable upon completion of a merger or acquisition. The company focuses on acquiring a business in the biotech sector.
